properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 53/14
BARENTS SEA
THE MINISTRY OF PETROLEUM AND ENERGY HAS ESTABLISHED A TEMPORARY 500 METER ZONE 
FROM THE COORDINATES UTM 73-51`47.881"N 24-32`29.957"E  
SAFETY ZONE IS CORRESPONDING TO A SECURITY
ZONE IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE PETROLEUM ACT SECTION 9-4(3) IN LICENSE 615
